grant_title: Creative Baltimore Fund FY26 Grant Program
project_area: General operating support for arts and cultural organizations
demographic_requirements: None explicitly stated beyond organizational eligibility
eligibility_summary: Baltimore-based arts and cultural organizations with operating budgets under $300,000, operating for at least two years, and holding 501(c)(3) status (or fiscal sponsorship equivalent). Priority given to organizations not funded in the past three fiscal years.
